_comment: OPERATOR-DROPPED LOCAL FILE (test copy, IMPLEMENTATION-014C) -- structured extract of an IREN earnings-call transcript. Company speakers (prepared remarks + Q&A answers) are company_claim; an analyst's question is reported_claim; an unrecognised speaker role (the operator) is conservatively reported_claim with a visible gap. Deterministic; local file only.

prepared_remarks.speaker: Daniel Roberts
prepared_remarks.text: We energized the first 50 megawatts of liquid-cooled AI data center capacity at Childress during the quarter

prepared_remarks.speaker: Belinda Nucifora
prepared_remarks.text: Cash and equivalents ended the quarter at $1.8 billion and the Horizon build remains fully funded

qa.speaker: Jane Smith
qa.text: How should we think about the trajectory of power costs at Childress as the new capacity ramps?

qa.speaker: Daniel Roberts
qa.text: We expect power costs to remain in the low three cents per kilowatt hour range as we scale

qa.speaker: Operator
qa.text: Our next question comes from the line of Jane Smith with Example Securities
